strengths: Matches primary stack directly: 3 years of React + TypeScript at Optilyz (pricing platform), currently developing TypeScript/Node.js with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong full-stack capability with 20 years of experience across web, mobile, backend systems; demonstrated rapid framework adoption (transitioned to iOS/Apple TV mid-career at WatchUp)
BS in Computer Science from MIT; strong engineering practices background (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews evident across multiple senior roles including RIDE Capital)
concerns: No specific Jest, Vitest, or Playwright experience mentioned; testing background is primarily in D-language tools (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) despite demonstrated TDD practice
Nest.js not mentioned; while extensive Node.js experience across multiple roles, this specific framework has not been used
PostgreSQL not in skillset (has MongoDB and MySQL); GCP/Azure not mentioned (only AWS shown); Kotlin not listed (Java is)
response.justification: Szabo has direct experience with the primary stack: React and TypeScript from 3 years at Optilyz, plus current TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq with AI-agent infrastructure development (a required skill). However, no JavaScript/TypeScript testing framework experience is documented—testing expertise exists but is grounded in D-language tools rather than Jest/Vitest. Nest.js is not mentioned, though extensive Node.js background provides strong foundation. Other gaps include PostgreSQL (has relational DB experience with MySQL) and single-cloud experience (AWS only). Overall, core competencies align well; specific tooling gaps are learnable for a senior developer with this track record.
